Public transport

Train station "Muiderpoort"

The station is 260m* away and is a 4 min walk*.

Stop(halte) "Dapperstraat"

The stop is 220m* away from Nieuwland and is a 3 min walk*. The available trams are:

  • 1 - Muiderpoortstation - Osdorp De Aker
  • 3 - Frederik Hendriksplantsoen - FlevoPark
  • 14 - VU medisch centrum - Centraal Station

The available buses are:

  • 37 - Amstelstation - Station Noord
  • 245 - Schiphol Airport/Plaza - Oostzanerdijk

This stop is not accessible for wheelchairs, has no visibility aids, and does not have a bike rack. There are limited seating options and there is a roofed waiting area.

Stop(halte) "Eerste van Swindenstraat" and "Wijttenbachstraat"

The stop is anywhere between 450m* and 550m* distance and 6 – 8 min* walk depending on where you originated from. It has similar accessibility options as "Dapperstraat". The available trams are:

  • 19 - Diemen Sniep – Station Sloterdijk

*The public transport options, distances and walking speeds are based on google maps.
